title: Iran's Missile Firepower Has Almost Run Out
key_claims: Israel direct BM series Days 1-5 (73/57/28/20/9 = 187 — CONTESTED; see conflicts.md). Global preliminary totals Days 1-5 (438/170/186/108/42 — revised down in later reports). Launchers ~400 pre-war; ~75% neutralized by Mar 5-7; ~70-100 remaining. MRBM ~2000 pre-war; 47-73% lost. SRBM 6000-8000 pre-war; 23-52% lost. 88% drop in Israel-directed fire by Day 5. 90% total decline.

title: Operations Epic Fury and Roaring Lion — 3/11/26 Update
